understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` on the grid by navigating through the level before running out of steps or landing on spikes.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Player can only move LEFT or RIGHT horizontally; after each move, gravity pulls them automatically in the current gravity direction (DOWN = lower y values toward y=0) until landing on a solid tile, hitting a hazard, or reaching the goal. CLICK removes breakable 'x' tiles at a target position without advancing the step counter toward moving_platform hazards. Spikes ('u'/'v') cause immediate failure. UNDO reverts the last action. Each attempt has a 50-step budget.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` on the grid by navigating through the level before running out of steps or landing on spikes.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Player can only move LEFT or RIGHT horizontally; after each move, gravity pulls them automatically in the current gravity direction (DOWN = lower y values toward y=0) until landing on a solid tile, hitting a hazard, or reaching the goal. CLICK removes breakable 'x' tiles at a target position without advancing the step counter toward moving_platform hazards. Spikes ('u'/'v') cause immediate failure. UNDO reverts the last action. Each attempt has a 50-step budget.
